indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a smooth, non-slip surface suitable for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: several tables and chairs
indicators.rationale: Tables and chairs obstruct the open floor space required for yoga.

indicators.name: bookshelves along walls
indicators.rationale: Bookshelves reduce available floor space and create visual clutter.

indicators.name: open floor area
indicators.rationale: An open floor area is essential for yoga practice.

indicators.name: chairs and tables arranged
indicators.rationale: Arranged furniture obstructs the open floor space.

reasoning_summary: The scene has a hardwood floor suitable for yoga, but several tables and chairs obstruct the open floor space required for yoga practice. The presence of bookshelves along the walls also reduces available floor space and creates visual clutter. The open floor area is positive, but the arrangement of furniture is negative. Overall, the space is marginally adequate for yoga.
